mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.nickname, u.icon_url FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.toilet_id = #{toiletId} AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT r.*, u.nickname, u.icon_url FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews (toilet_id, user_id, clean_score, content) VALUES (#{toiletId}, #{userId}, #{cleanScore}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET deleted_at = NOW(), status = 'HIDDEN' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.nickname, u.icon_url FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT AVG(CAST(clean_score AS DECIMAL(3,1))) FROM reviews WHERE toilet_id = #{toiletId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE toilet_id = #{toiletId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL
